series_metadata.series_title: Release and Permit to Make Direct Purchases
series_metadata.series_description: Used to make emergency purchases of all materials, supplies and equipment and to make direct payments or engage in contact of services.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years plus current fiscal year. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: 3 years plus current fiscal year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
